mapper.select: select m.message_id, m.deceased_id, m.visitor_name, m.visitor_phone, m.relation, m.content, m.is_audited, m.ip_address, m.create_time, d.name as deceased_name from mem_message m left join mem_deceased d on m.deceased_id = d.deceased_id where m.message_id = #{messageId}

select m.message_id, m.deceased_id, m.visitor_name, m.visitor_phone, m.relation, m.content, m.is_audited, m.ip_address, m.create_time, d.name as deceased_name from mem_message m left join mem_deceased d on m.deceased_id = d.deceased_id where m.deceased_id = #{deceasedId} and m.is_audited = '1' order by m.create_time desc
select count(*) from mem_message where deceased_id = #{deceasedId} and is_audited = '1'
mapper.insert: insert into mem_message (deceased_id, visitor_name, visitor_phone, relation, content, is_audited, ip_address, create_time) values (#{deceasedId}, #{visitorName}, #{visitorPhone}, #{relation}, #{content}, #{isAudited}, #{ipAddress}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
update mem_message set is_audited = #{status} where message_id in
#{messageId}
mapper.delete:
delete from mem_message where message_id in
#{messageId}
